water.name: Stevens Creek and all tributaries upstream of Stevens Creek Reservoir

authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife
U.S. Geological Survey (Geographic Names Information System)

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 1667885, "Stevens Creek", Stream, CA, Santa Clara Co.
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":1667885,"gaz_name":"Stevens Creek","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"Santa Clara"} — geometry multipoint; first point converts to lon -122.0636, lat 37.4458, at the creek's mouth on San Francisco Bay near Mountain View (third/last point is the headwater source on Black Mountain, lon -122.1872, lat 37.3111). Both match Wikipedia's infobox mouth (37.44583°N, 122.06361°W) and source (37.31111°N, 122.18722°W) coordinates for Stevens Creek almost exactly. Corrects the file's prior coordinate (-122.1200, 37.3050), which sat roughly midway between the source and Stevens Creek Reservoir and does not match any GNIS-derived point — it appears to have been a guessed estimate placed near the reservoir referenced in the water's name rather than pulled from GNIS. Note the corrected point (the creek's canonical GNIS/mouth location) is several km downstream of the actual regulated reach (upstream of the reservoir); GNIS has no separate point for the sub-reach, so per this dataset's established convention (see los-gatos-creek.json, alameda-creek-and-tributaries.json) the canonical stream point is used as the water's representative coordinate.

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(148) — Stevens Creek and all tributaries upstream of Stevens Creek Reservoir (Santa Clara Co.)
sources.quotedText: (148) Stevens Creek and all tributaries upstream of Stevens Creek Reservoir (Santa Clara Co.). All year. Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used. 0 trout

sources.title: 2026 California Freshwater Sport Fishing Regulations (updated June 1, 2026)
Fish in Parks — Santa Clara County Parks
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

regulations.humanSummary: Open all year, catch-and-release only (0 trout bag)
regulations.verbatimText: All year. Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used. 0 trout
